scripts.package:windows: npm run build && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js windows && deno task package:windows
scripts.package:windows:gui: npm run build && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js windows && deno task package:windows:gui
scripts.package:mac:arm: npm run build && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js mac-arm64 && deno task package:mac:arm
